query: Find 10 buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: resolve Drammen municipality geometry by kommunenavn

2.description: get 200-year flood zones filtered by Drammen municipality extent

3.description: get buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones

4.description: get quick-clay hazard zones filtered by Drammen municipality extent

5.description: calculate distance from each flood-affected building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

6.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m)

7.description: sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending, then by building ID ascending
